topic: How to sell a used golf cart online

brief.summary: Create a commercial-informational article for golf cart owners, dealers, and operators who want a practical process for listing and selling a used golf cart online. The article should explain when a marketplace approach makes sense, what buyers expect in a listing, how to prepare the cart before photos and inspection, and which mistakes reduce buyer confidence.
outline: H1: How to Sell a Used Golf Cart Online
H2: When a marketplace is the right sales channel
H2: What buyers expect to see in a used golf cart listing
H2: How to prepare the cart before photos and inquiries
H2: Common mistakes that reduce buyer confidence
H2: What to ask before choosing where to list
H2: Closing CTA for seller support

seo_strategy.opportunity_rationale: Very strong marketplace fit with clear seller intent, practical content structure, and high value as an early trust-building entry point for a new site.
